# Security Policy

This is a static, front-end-only site — no backend, no database, no user data,
no secrets in the repo. The attack surface is small.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you find something worth reporting (e.g. a dependency/CDN concern or an XSS
vector in the demo terminal), please open a **[private security advisory](https://github.com/henrylee94/lab/security/advisories/new)**
on this repository, or open a regular issue for non-sensitive reports.

Please do **not** include real personal data in any report.
